comment: Memory contract for the Vector-Heuristic pipeline (Phase 5 revision: generative SLM removed). verify:memory recomputes the footprint from the shipped assets and fails on breach. The dominant former risk (a ~1 GB mmap'd GGUF) is gone; the worst case is now a transient ONNX embed call.

runtimeDirtyBytes.comment: 300 MB Hermes/RN/UI + 50 MB SQLite ceiling (unchanged, audited)

embedderComment: onnxruntime-react-native + int8 MiniLM (~23 MB weights) during a SINGLE short-string embed call, session released after: 100 MB ceiling.
